message:
feat(deps): add C library submodules for font rendering (ft-1memj.2)

Add git submodules for the vendored C libraries required by
deps-freetype and deps-harfbuzz build scripts:
- freetype2 (VER-2-13-3) — font rasterization
- libpng (v1.6.44) — PNG support for freetype
- zlib (v1.3.1) — compression for freetype/libpng
- harfbuzz (12.3.2) — text shaping

All 11 vendored GUI-layer crates now compile as workspace members:
frecency, lfucache, ratelim, gui-subcommands, open-url,
toast-notification, font, client, window, freetype, harfbuzz.

New clones need: git submodule update --init --recursive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+[submodule "frankenterm/deps-freetype/freetype2"]
+	path = frankenterm/deps-freetype/freetype2
+	url = https://github.com/freetype/freetype2.git
+[submodule "frankenterm/deps-freetype/libpng"]
+	path = frankenterm/deps-freetype/libpng
+	url = https://github.com/glennrp/libpng.git
+[submodule "frankenterm/deps-freetype/zlib"]
+	path = frankenterm/deps-freetype/zlib
+	url = https://github.com/madler/zlib.git
+[submodule "frankenterm/deps-harfbuzz/harfbuzz"]
+	path = frankenterm/deps-harfbuzz/harfbuzz
+	url = https://github.com/harfbuzz/harfbuzz.git
